mapper.insert: INSERT INTO person_idcard_image ( draft_uuid, user_id, original_filename, stored_filename, storage_path, content_type, file_size, file_sha256, ocr_status ) VALUES ( #{draftUuid}, #{userId}, #{originalFilename}, #{storedFilename}, #{storagePath}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileSha256}, 'SKIPPED' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM person_idcard_image WHERE file_sha256 = #{fileSha256} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM person_idcard_image WHERE person_id = #{personId} ORDER BY image_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE person_idcard_image SET ocr_status = 'SUCCESS', ocr_provider = #{ocrProvider}, ocr_engine_version = #{ocrEngineVersion}, ocr_elapsed_ms = #{elapsedMs}, ocr_confidence = #{confidence}, ocr_idcard_full = #{idCardFull}, ocr_idcard_masked = #{idCardMasked}, ocr_name = #{name}, ocr_birth_date = #{birthDate}, ocr_gender = #{gender}, ocr_ethnicity = #{ethnicity}, ocr_address = #{address}, ocr_raw_json = #{rawJson} WHERE image_id = #{imageId}

UPDATE person_idcard_image SET ocr_status = 'FAILED', ocr_provider = #{ocrProvider}, ocr_engine_version = #{ocrEngineVersion}, ocr_elapsed_ms = #{elapsedMs}, ocr_error = #{error} WHERE image_id = #{imageId}
UPDATE person_idcard_image SET ocr_status = 'SKIPPED' WHERE image_id = #{imageId}
UPDATE person_idcard_image SET person_id = #{personId} WHERE image_id = #{imageId} AND person_id IS NULL
